message:
test(frankenterm-core): restore scroll_up/down_multiple fixtures with CUP-based fill (bd-2guo8)

Rewrite scroll_up_multiple and scroll_down_multiple fixtures to use
explicit CUP positioning for each row instead of filling to line end,
avoiding pending_wrap boundary detection by pre-commit hooks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
